scripts.verify:ui: sh -c 'export PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH"; next dev --port 3001 >/tmp/sedaiia-web-dev.log 2>&1 & PID=$!; trap "kill $PID 2>/dev/null || true" EXIT; for i in $(seq 1 30); do curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:3001/ >/dev/null && break; sleep 1; done; agent-browser close >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; agent-browser open http://127.0.0.1:3001/ && agent-browser wait --load networkidle && agent-browser eval "document.body?.innerText?.trim().length > 50 ? \"HAS_CONTENT\" : \"BLANK\"" && agent-browser eval "document.querySelector(\"[data-nextjs-dialog], .vite-error-overlay\") ? \"ERROR_OVERLAY\" : \"OK\"" && agent-browser snapshot -i && agent-browser screenshot verif-home-agent-browser.png && agent-browser close'
